---

## Problem
What problem would this feature solve? Is it related to something that's missing or frustrating?

## Proposed Solution
What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Anything else relevant (mockups, related issues, etc.).
